rulings.Case Title: BRETT STAFFORD et al VS. KAMRAN ARDEBILCHI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Class Certification
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, October 15, 2012, line 3. PLAINTIFFs BRETT STAFFORD, KOICHI MATSUDA and BARBARA BRADSHAW's Motion For Class Certification. The motion is denied without prejudice. The class is overbroad as defined. Individual issues among the class members predominate and class treatment will not provide a substantial benefit to the Court. The community of interest requirement is not met for most causes of action because each tenant's right to recover depends on facts peculiar to that tenant. = (AJR/501)
